design_philosophy: A frictionless, highly functional, and modern institutional system. Prioritizes data legibility and operational clarity through a strict grid layout, generous internal padding, and a precise color system. Relies on crisp typography and subtle micro-interactions to create a 'trustworthy yet modern' feel without being overly clinical.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none text-[#1E293B]
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-[#64748B]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing & Bento Grids. Follows 'Control Room' grid strategies for dashboards.

cards.base: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-2xl shadow-sm transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#2563EB] to-blue-500 text-white font-medium rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2563EB]/50 focus:outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1E293B] border border-[#E2E8F0] font-medium rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-[#F8FAFC] hover:border-blue-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E2E8F0]

chatbot.trigger: fixed bottom-6 right-6 h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#2563EB] to-blue-500 shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center text-white z-50
chatbot.panel: fixed bottom-24 right-6 w-80 md:w-96 max-h-[600px] bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden z-50 origin-bottom-right transition-all

components.navbar: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-[#E2E8F0] h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6
components.sidebar: fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-30 w-64 bg-white border-r border-[#E2E8F0] flex flex-col pt-16 transition-transform

login_background.description: Abstract minimalist 3D geometric background in soft blue and white for the login page to create a modern SaaS feel.

laboratory_equipment.description: Microscopes in a clean university laboratory, useful for empty states or lab detail pages.

computer_lab.description: Clean, modern computer lab setup for lab catalog cover images.

student_avatar.description: Smiling student holding a folder, useful for profile placeholders or onboarding.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the user's explicit hex codes. Do NOT use standard Tailwind blue-500 for primary if it doesn't match #2563EB exactly (configure tailwind config).
Ensure all components are built using React and .js files (not TypeScript).
Use Shadcn UI for complex interactives (Dialog, Select, DropdownMenu, Tabs, Toast via Sonner) to ensure accessibility.
Do NOT use the default Shadcn Card component for the dashboard widgets if it restricts layout; build custom HTML/Tailwind cards using the guidelines above (rounded-2xl, specific hover states).
For all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) and key data points, YOU MUST add a role-based 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-login-button').
Implement the Chatbot panel using Framer Motion for a smooth slide-up effect from the trigger button.
For charts in the analytics dashboard, use Recharts with colors matching the system palette (Primary Blue, Accent Green, Warning Amber).
Ensure optical alignment inside data tables (left-align text, right-align numbers/metrics).
Respect generous spacing rules - dashboard widgets must not look cluttered. Use p-6 inside widget containers.
